# Fixture: cardarius_thomas_quit_reopen
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 8.4s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Cardarius! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: I don't see the orientation in the app to start?
Concierge: On the Home tab, look for the In-app orientation card with the blue Required to unlock shifts banner.
Partner: It's not on there.

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
What do you see on your Home screen right now? That'll help me point you to the right spot.
